description: Given a Snowflake table inventory, the skill should author an Orchestra v1 data-quality pipeline YAML: one SNOWFLAKE_RUN_TEST task per inferred check, grouped by category, groups sequenced via depends_on, connection via ${{ ENV.SNOWFLAKE_CONNECTION }}, and a failure alert.

evals.prompt: Here's an inventory of my Snowflake tables (see files/analytics_inventory.md). I want data quality tests on them. Build the Orchestra data-quality testing pipeline YAML and write it to pipeline.yml in the current directory. Don't run anything against Snowflake, don't push to git, and don't deploy — just produce the YAML file.
evals.expected_output: An Orchestra v1 pipeline YAML covering both tables: completeness/not-null on the ID columns, uniqueness on the dimension primary key, and freshness on the fact timestamp, organised into task groups that are sequenced with depends_on, with a failure alert.

assertions.text: Output is a valid YAML document
Pipeline declares version v1
Every task uses the SNOWFLAKE integration
Every task runs the SNOWFLAKE_RUN_TEST job
Tasks connect via ${{ ENV.SNOWFLAKE_CONNECTION }}
At least three test task groups are present
Test tasks define an error_threshold_expression
Task groups are chained via depends_on
A failure alert is configured
Includes a not-null / completeness check (queries for IS NULL)
Covers both FCT_ORDERS and DIM_CUSTOMERS
Includes a uniqueness check on the dimension primary key (CUSTOMER_ID)
Includes a freshness check on the fact timestamp (ORDER_TS)
Inferred tests are sensible for each column's role and not redundant

evals.prompt: I have one Snowflake fact table described in files/orders_only.md. It's append-only and should never go stale, and the IDs must never be null. Write me an Orchestra data quality pipeline (YAML) that checks freshness and ID completeness on it. Save it to pipeline.yml here. Generate the YAML only — no live queries, no deploy.
evals.expected_output: An Orchestra v1 pipeline YAML for SALES.CORE.FCT_TRANSACTIONS with at least a freshness check on TXN_TS and a not-null check on TRANSACTION_ID / ACCOUNT_ID, each as a SNOWFLAKE_RUN_TEST task in a sequenced group, with a failure alert.

assertions.text: Output is a valid YAML document
Pipeline declares version v1
Every task runs the SNOWFLAKE_RUN_TEST job
Tasks connect via ${{ ENV.SNOWFLAKE_CONNECTION }}
At least two test task groups are present
Task groups are chained via depends_on
Includes a not-null check (queries for IS NULL)
Targets FCT_TRANSACTIONS
A failure alert is configured
Includes a freshness check on TXN_TS (e.g. max(TXN_TS) within a recent window)
Does not invent checks the user did not ask for and the schema does not motivate

evals.prompt: can you set up some quality checks for my products dimension in snowflake? details are in files/dim_products.md. prices shouldnt be negative and the launch dates are sometimes garbage. give me the orchestra yaml in pipeline.yml — just the file, dont run or deploy anything
evals.expected_output: An Orchestra v1 pipeline YAML for RETAIL.DWH.DIM_PRODUCTS with a non-negative price check on LIST_PRICE, a year-bounds / sensible-date check on LAUNCH_DATE, and a uniqueness check on the primary key, each a sequenced SNOWFLAKE_RUN_TEST task with a failure alert.

assertions.text: Output is a valid YAML document
Pipeline declares version v1
Every task runs the SNOWFLAKE_RUN_TEST job
Tasks connect via ${{ ENV.SNOWFLAKE_CONNECTION }}
Task groups are chained via depends_on
Includes a negative-price guard on LIST_PRICE (queries for < 0)
Targets DIM_PRODUCTS
A failure alert is configured
Includes a sensible-date / year-bounds check on LAUNCH_DATE
Includes a uniqueness check on the primary key (PRODUCT_SK or PRODUCT_ID)
